message:
docs(adopters): drop user @-mentions from Submariner row (#6224)

Per the project convention 'users don't go in ADOPTERS.md' (same fix
applied earlier to the Longhorn row), drop the @dfarrell07 and
@tpantelis mentions from the Submariner entry. The endorsement still
links to submariner-io/submariner#3907 where the conversation lives,
which is sufficient citation.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -14,4 +14,4 @@ Listed below are organizations that have adopted, or benefitted from, KubeStella
 | Microcks | Guided install mission for Microcks via KubeStellar Console, with install recipe contributed to the Microcks community repo ([microcks/community#125](https://github.com/microcks/community/pull/125)) and endorsed by Microcks co-founder @yada in [microcks/microcks#1997](https://github.com/microcks/microcks/issues/1997) | Sandbox | [Microcks](https://microcks.io) · [Install Mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-microcks) |
 | kcp | Guided install mission for kcp via KubeStellar Console, with engagement from kcp maintainers in [kcp-dev/kcp#3923](https://github.com/kcp-dev/kcp/issues/3923) | Sandbox | [kcp](https://kcp.io) · [Install Mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-kcp) |
 | kube-vip | Guided install mission for kube-vip via KubeStellar Console, with upstream collaboration tracked in [kube-vip/kube-vip#1472](https://github.com/kube-vip/kube-vip/issues/1472) | Sandbox | [kube-vip](https://kube-vip.io) · [Install Mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-kube-vip) |
-| Submariner | Guided install mission for Submariner via KubeStellar Console using the current `subctl` workflow (deploy-broker, join, verify, cross-cluster connectivity), endorsed by Submariner maintainers @dfarrell07 and @tpantelis in [submariner-io/submariner#3907](https://github.com/submariner-io/submariner/issues/3907) | Sandbox | [Submariner](https://submariner.io) · [Install Mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-submariner) |
+| Submariner | Guided install mission for Submariner via KubeStellar Console using the current `subctl` workflow (deploy-broker, join, verify, cross-cluster connectivity), endorsed in [submariner-io/submariner#3907](https://github.com/submariner-io/submariner/issues/3907) | Sandbox | [Submariner](https://submariner.io) · [Install Mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-submariner) |
